title: PMS Removable White Swivel Hook-6.3cm x 7.3cm (XL), 1 Piece, 6.3 cm x 7.3 cm
features: ROBUST & HEAVY-DUTY: Our XL removable white swivel hook is designed to hold up to 3kg of weight, making it the perfect heavy-duty solution for organizing and hanging various items around the home.

EFFORTLESS INSTALLATION & REMOVAL: The innovative removable design of this swivel hook allows for easy installation and removal without causing any damage, providing both convenience and reliability for your home needs.

VERSATILE SWIVEL FEATURE: Featuring a 360-degree swivel design, this hook ensures ultimate flexibility and functionality for hanging items, making it the ideal tool for laundry, storage, and other organizational needs.
STYLISH AND DISCREET: With its minimalistic white design and compact size of 6.3cm x 7.3cm, our swivel hook seamlessly integrates into any home décor, offering both style and practicality.

MULTIPURPOSE USES: Perfect for various applications in your home, this removable swivel hook can be used to hang kitchenware, clothing, towels, and many other items, ensuring that your living spaces remain clutter-free and organized.
description: Introducing the removable white swivel hook (XL), the ultimate solution for your home storage needs. This heavy-duty hook boasts dimensions of 6.3cm x 7.3cm, making it the perfect size for hanging a variety of items, from coats and bags to kitchen utensils. The hook's standout feature is its robust construction, ensuring it can comfortably hold up to a whopping 3kg. Not only is this hook extremely practical, but it's also effortlessly stylish with its sleek white finish. It's fully removable and swivels for added convenience. Whether you're aiming to declutter your hallway or organize your kitchen, our removable white swivel hook is the ideal home-use accessory.
